Subject description

This saves automatically and is attached to Like, Neutral, Dislike, Don't know, or Later.

Everything else

All categories2,500 subjects

Browse subjects

Search franchise names, standalone subjects, included titles, aliases, and previous decisions.

Decision history

Newest choices appear first. Undo Last restores the latest active choice. Individual entries can be undone only when they have not been replaced by a newer choice for the same subject.

Add a missing subject

Add a franchise, game, anime, film, tool, style, activity, creator, behavior, or anything else missing from the catalog.

Full backup

Every subject, decision, note, queue position, migration record, custom item, and reversible history entry.

Personality bible

Liked, neutral, disliked, unknown, and undecided subjects grouped for the final OMNIFRAME build.

Don't-know research queue

Only subjects marked Don't know, with descriptions, included titles, and notes. Upload this later so each can be explained before a final decision.

Readable report

A Markdown summary of all completed decisions and notes.

Import full backup

Restore a valid v3 full backup. Existing local v3 data is replaced after validation.

Install on this phone

Install the GitHub Pages site as a standalone offline-capable app using the OMNIFRAME icon.

Reset v3 review

Delete all v3 decisions, notes, history, custom subjects, and queue progress after exporting a backup.

OMNIFRAME Review

Reset the v3 review?

This deletes all v3 decisions, notes, custom subjects, queue progress, and history from this browser.

Install OMNIFRAME Review

Open Chrome’s menu and choose Install app or Add to Home screen. The installed app uses the supplied OMNIFRAME icon and the same local review data.
